user_query: Change the second lunch on fathers third day to starbucks sandwhich

updates.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 3 > Father > Day 3 > Lunch > Hummus Snack Plate — Citrus Fresh Style

meal_suggestion.from: As a Citrus Fresh-style snack: assemble with 2–3 tablespoons hummus, 1 small whole-wheat pita cut into wedges, cucumber slices, cherry tomatoes, and a small cheese wedge. Add a squeeze of lemon or citrus zest to brighten the flavors. If dairy-free, omit cheese or substitute with a plant-based option.
meal_suggestion.to: Toast an artisan roll or sandwich bread. Layer oven-roasted turkey slices, Havarti cheese, lettuce, tomato, and thinly sliced red onion. Spread a light combination of mayonnaise and Dijon mustard (or a spinach pesto for more flavor). Press and warm briefly in a sandwich press or oven until the cheese softens. Serve with a side of apple slices or a small salad.

name.from: Hummus Snack Plate — Citrus Fresh Style

nutrition_note.from: This plate provides protein from hummus and cheese, plus fiber from whole-wheat pita and vegetables, and healthy fats from tahini in hummus. It offers a balanced mix of complex carbs, protein, and fats. Watch sodium from store-bought hummus and cheese; consider reduced-sodium options or smaller portions if needed. For a lighter version, you can reduce cheese or use part-skim options.
nutrition_note.to: Provides lean protein from turkey and calcium from Havarti. Using an artisan roll supplies carbohydrates and fiber if whole-grain is chosen. Trim mayonnaise or use a light spread to reduce added fat; add a side of fruit or salad to round out the meal with fiber and vitamins.

short_description.from: Colorful Mediterranean-inspired snack plate featuring hummus, whole-wheat pita, veggies, and a cheese component for protein, fiber, and healthy fats.
short_description.to: Starbucks sandwich — oven-roasted turkey, creamy Havarti, crisp lettuce and tomato on a toasted artisan roll, served with a light spread for a balanced deli-style lunch.

updates.reasoning: Transformed the Hummus Snack Plate into a Starbucks-style sandwich per request. All meal fields rewritten to represent the new sandwich lunch (short_description updated as requested).
